main_problems: Missed calls from new patients go to voicemail — many don't leave a message and call a competitor
Auto accident patients are time-sensitive — delays in follow-up mean lost cases to other practices
No automated system to follow up on appointment inquiries submitted after hours
New patients who no-show often fall through the cracks with no reschedule sequence
Existing patients have no reminder system — appointment no-show rates are higher than necessary

recommended_automations.name: Missed Call Text-Back
recommended_automations.description: When a call is missed, an automated SMS fires within 30 seconds: 'Hi! This is Lakewood Chiropractic — sorry we missed your call. We'd love to help. Reply here and we'll get right back to you, or visit [chatbot link] to book anytime.'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Recovers 20–30% of missed calls that would otherwise go to a competitor

recommended_automations.name: Auto Accident Fast-Response Sequence
recommended_automations.description: When a chatbot or web form flags an auto accident inquiry, a 3-touch sequence fires: Touch 1 — SMS within 5 minutes from the office. Touch 2 — same-day follow-up call reminder. Touch 3 — next morning email with insurance info and intake form link.
recommended_automations.trigger: Chatbot flags 'auto accident' intent or form submission
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Auto accident cases average $3,000–$8,000 in revenue — recovering 2 extra cases/month = $6,000–$16,000

recommended_automations.name: Appointment Confirmation + Reminder
recommended_automations.description: Automated SMS sent at booking confirmation, then again 24 hours and 2 hours before the appointment. Includes easy reschedule option to reduce no-shows without losing the patient.

recommended_automations.name: New Patient No-Show Reschedule Sequence
recommended_automations.description: If a new patient no-shows, automated SMS fires 1 hour after missed appointment: 'We missed you today — life happens! We'd love to get you rescheduled. Reply here or click [link].' Follow-up again at 48 hours.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Recovers 30–40% of no-shows who would otherwise not reschedule

recommended_automations.name: New Lead → CRM Sync + Owner Alert
recommended_automations.description: Every chatbot lead, web form submission, or missed call is automatically logged to Google Sheets with name, phone, source, and timestamp. Owner receives an SMS or email alert for any auto accident or high-priority inquiry.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Full pipeline visibility — no leads fall through

tools_stack.forms: Practice management system webhook or Typeform

expected_outcomes.leads_recovered_monthly: 10–20 additional new patient inquiries from missed calls

implementation_timeline: 5–7 business days to build and test
